author: CasaOS Team
description: Duplicati is a free, open source, backup client that securely stores encrypted, incremental, compressed backups on cloud storage services and remote file servers.
tagline: Store securely encrypted backups in the cloud!
title: Duplicati
release_note:
- Duplicati 2.1.0 is the configured image line for this CasaOS entry.
- The upstream 2.1.0.x release notes include critical fixes for failed upload handling, source URL path handling, zip fallback support, and macOS dark/light mode icons.
- Major changes from older 2.0.8.x builds include .NET 8, Kestrel, mandatory password authentication, and updated database versions.
